resources.string: Fast access to Google Lens by long-pressing your navigation bar.

DirectLens is the ultra-lightweight alternative to \"Circle to Search\" for all Android smartphones (v11+).\n\nEnable the accessibility service to launch Google Lens with a simple long press on your navigation bar.
Adjust the power of the \"Charging Up\" and final click.
Show a subtle Google-colored animation on trigger.
DirectLens is designed to be ultra-lightweight. It only wakes up when you touch the detection zone and consumes virtually zero battery.

DirectLens collects absolutely zero personal data. Screenshots are captured locally on your device and passed directly to the official Google app. We use no remote servers and have no tracking mechanisms.

DirectLens is an independent, open-source project. It is not affiliated with, authorized, maintained, sponsored, or endorsed by Google LLC. \"Google Lens\" is a trademark of Google LLC. Once an image is forwarded to the Google app, Google\'s own Terms of Service and Privacy Policy apply to that image and its subsequent processing.
DirectLens is free and open source (GPLv3). It requires no root access.
Support an independent developer! A 5-star review helps more than you think.
